case_title: ROSYLAND BAUER VS. KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC. D.B.A. GRAND CAFE SF, CA.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN C. LAMBERT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BAUER, ROSYLAND AS TO DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC. D.B.A. GRAND CAFE SF, CA. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
